subject: physics
title: 17M.1.SL.TZ2.1
question_html:
A stone falls from rest to the bottom of a water well of depth d. The time t taken to fall is 2.0 ±0.2 s. The depth of the well is calculated to be 20 m using d =  1 2 at 2. The uncertainty in a is negligible.

What is the absolute uncertainty in d?

A.  ± 0.2 m

B.  ± 1 m

C.  ± 2 m

D.  ± 4 m
